AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.subtitle: My name is Mahmoud. I started my journey behind the lens in 2018 in Tanta. Where luxury meets simplicity 🤎
AboutPage.paragraph1: My vision has always been clear: to leave a unique mark on the most important days of your life. Every photo I capture is created with love, care, and passion — so it truly reflects you and stays with you for years to come.
AboutPage.paragraph2: I don’t just take pictures… I document emotions and create memories you’ll always remember.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: Welcome to our website. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about this privacy notice or our practices with regard to your personal information, please contact us.
Privacy.infoCollectionText: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register on the website, express an interest in obtaining information about us or our services, or otherwise when you contact us. This includes names, phone numbers, and booking details.
Privacy.howUseText: We use personal information collected via our website for a variety of business purposes, primarily to facilitate your bookings, improve our services, and communicate with you regarding your photoshoot sessions.
Privacy.sharingText: We only share your information with your consent, to comply with laws, to provide you with services, to protect your rights, or to fulfill business obligations. Your photos will only be shared on our social media platforms if you explicitly agree to it.
Privacy.securityText: We have implemented appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect the security of any personal information we process. However, no electronic transmission over the internet or information storage technology can be guaranteed to be 100% secure.
Privacy.contactText: If you have questions or comments about this notice, you may contact us using the information provided on our contact page.

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions
Terms.intro: Welcome to our website. By accessing or using our services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions. If you disagree with any part of these terms, please do not use our services.
Terms.bookingText: A deposit is required to secure your booking. In the event of a cancellation less than one month before the scheduled date, the deposit is non-refundable.
Terms.servicesText: We provide photography services as agreed upon in your package. Any additional requests outside the agreed package may incur extra charges.
Terms.copyrightText: We retain the copyright to all images. However, you will receive personal use rights for the photos. We will not use your photos on our social media without your explicit permission.
Terms.liabilityText: While we strive for the highest quality, we cannot be held liable for unforeseen circumstances that prevent the completion of services (e.g., severe weather, illness). In such rare cases, we will make every effort to provide a suitable replacement or refund the amount paid.
Terms.changesText: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to this website.

Metadata.title: Mimo Photography
Metadata.description: The best photography studio in Egypt for wedding, engagement, graduation, and portrait photography with the highest quality to capture your happiest moments. Mimo photography capturing your best moments.
